error: CUDA out of memory. Tried to allocate 36.00 GiB. GPU 2 has 31.74 GiB total.
root_cause: Sequential dispatcher (core/runtime/graph/sequential_dispatcher.py) does NOT support op-level tiling interceptors. register_op_uid_interceptor wires into compiled_seq (graph_executor.py:915) and triton_seq (graph_executor.py:1859) ONLY. The tiling engine attached by Prism for the 4Kpx convolution overflow op cannot fire on the sequential path, so the 36 GiB allocation reaches CUDA unmodified.
scope_note: Pre-existing structural — out of scope of Phase 1.5 (autotune chantier scoped to mm/bmm/addmm/conv2d kernel tuning, not graph dispatcher integration). Tracking as candidate for a separate chantier P-SEQUENTIAL-TILING-INTEGRATION if sequential 4Kpx becomes a release requirement.
